title: UBUSHINJACYAHA v HAFASHIMANA
text:
UBUSHINJACYAHA v HAFASHIMANA
[Rwanda URUKIKO RW’UBUJURIRE - PAA 01072/2024/CA (Umugwaneza, P.J.) 30
Ukuboza 2025]
Amategeko agenga imanza nshinjabyaha – Igihano – Impamvu nyoroshyacyaha – Uwakoze icyaha
gihanishwa igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu, igihe hemejwe impamvu nyoroshyacyaha,
ntashobora kugabanyirizwa igihano cy’igifungo ngo kijye munsi y’imyaka cumi itanu (15),
n’igihano cy’ihazabu ntigishobora kugabanywa ngo kijye munsi ya ¼ cy’igihano cy’ihazabu gito
giteganyirijwe icyaha cyakozwe.
Incamake y’ikibazo: Muri uru rubanza, Ubushinjacyaha bwakurikiranye uregwa mu Rukiko
Rwisumbuye rwa Nyagatare bumurega icyaha cyo gukora ibikorwa byerekeranye
n’ibiyobyabwenge cyangwa urusobe rw’imiti ikoreshwa nka byo, aburana acyemera, avuga ko
urumogi yafatanwe yari yaruranguye n’umuhungu w’Irurenge, mu gihe yari ategeje umuntu uza
kururangura ararufatanwa. Urwo Rukiko rwaciye urubanza rumuhamya icyaha cyo gucuruza
ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi, rumuhanisha igifungo cy’imyaka 25 n’ihazabu
y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni 21.000.000 Frw.
Uregwa yajuririye Urukiko Rukuru/Urugereko rwa Rwamagana, avuga ko yahanishijwe igihano
kirekire kandi yaraburanye yemera icyaha ndetse ari n’ubwa mbere yari akurikiranywe mu
butabera mu buryo buzwi, asaba ko icyo gihano cyagabanywa byashoboka kikanasubikwa. Urwo
Rukiko narwo rwciye urubanza rusanga hari impamvu zituma igihano yahanishijwe ku rwego
rubanza cyakongera kugabanywa rumuhanisha igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu ya
5.000.000 Frw.
Uregwa yajuriye bwa kabiri mu Rukiko rw’Ubujurire, asaba kugabanyirizwa igihano kugeza ku
gihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka itanu 5 kikanasubikwa akajya kwita ku bana be batagira ubitaho
kuko nyina ubabyara yabataye.
Ubushinjacyaha bwo bwaburanye buvuga ko atakongera kugabanyirizwa igihano kuko
yagabanyirijwe bihagije ahabwa igihano gikwiranye n’icyaha yakoze, akaba atabasha kugaragaza
niba Urukiko rubanza rwaba rwarakoresheje nabi itegeko cyangwa ubushishozi bwarwo mu
gutanga icyo gihano
Incamake y’icyemezo: Uwakoze icyaha gihanishwa igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu, igihe
hemejwe impamvu nyoroshyacyaha, ntashobora kugabanyirizwa igihano cy’igifu ngo kijye munsi
y’imyaka cumi itanu (15), n’igihano cy’ihazabu ntigishobora kugabanywa ngo kijye munsi ya ¼
cy’igihano cy’ihazabu gito giteganyirijwe icyaha cyakozwe.
Ubujurire nta shingiro bufite.
Amategeko yashingiweho:
Ingingo ya 2, agace ka (a) na (d) y’Itegeko Nº 059/2023 ryo ku wa 04/12/2023 rihindura Itegeko
Nº 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/08/2018 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange.
Ingingo ya 11, igika cya 3 y’Itegeko N° 69/2019 ryo ku wa 08/11/2019 rihindura Itegeko N°
68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/08/2018 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange.

Imanza zifashishijwe:
Ubushinjacyaha vs Cyubahiro Jean-Petit (Peth), RPAA 00747/2024/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire ku wa 23/05/2025.
Ubushinjacyaha vs Ntirenganya Jean Paul, RPAA 00237/2025/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire ku wa 21/11/2025.
Ubushinjacyaha vs Ntamavukiro Joseph, RPAA 00811/2024/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire ku wa 21/3/2025.
Ubushinjacyaha vs Ntirenganya Jean Paul, RPAA 00237/2025/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire ku wa ku wa 21/11/2025.
Ubushinjacyaha vs Twisungemungu Jeannette, RPAA 00293/2024/CA, rwaciwe n’Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire ku wa 26/02/2025.
Ubushinjacyaha vs Kwizera Didier, RPAA 00957/2024/CA, rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku
wa 22/04/2025.
Urubanza
I. IMITERERE Y’URUBANZA
[1] Ku itariki ya 19/05/2021, HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul ari mu Mudugudu wa Nimero I,
Akagari ka Gahurura, Umurenge wa Rukomo, Akarere ka Nyagatare yafatanwe urumogi rungana
n’udupfunyika 127 n’urundi rudafunze mu dupfunyika, yahise ashyikirizwa Ubugenzacyaha
atangira gukorwaho ipererereza, rirangiye Ubushinjacyaha bumugera Urukiko Rwisumbuye rwa
Nyagatare bumukurikiranyeho icyaha cyo gukora ibikorwa byerekeranye n’ibiyobyabwenge
cyangwa urusobe rw’imiti ikoreshwa nka byo, aburana acyemera, avuga ko urumogi yafatanwe
yari yaruranguye n’umuhungu w’Irurenge, mu gihe yari ategeje umuntu uza kururangura
ararufatanwa.
[2] Mu rubanza N° RP 00768/2021/TGI/NYG rwaciwe ku wa 15/07/2021, Urukiko
Rwisumbuye rwa Nyagatare, rushingiye ku kwemera icyaha kwa HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul
gushyigikiwe n’inyandikomvugo y’ifatira ry’urumogi yafatanwe ndetse n’imvugo
z’abatangabuhamya bamushinja, rwamuhamije icyaha cyo gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge byo mu
bwoko bw’urumogi, rumuhanisha igifungo cy’imyaka 25 n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda
miliyoni 21.000.000 Frw.
[3] HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul yajuririye Urukiko Rukuru/Urugereko rwa Rwamagana,
avuga ko yahanishijwe igihano kirekire kandi yaraburanye yemera icyaha ndetse ari n’ubwa mbere
yari akurikiranywe mu butabera mu buryo buzwi, asaba ko icyo gihano cyagabanywa byashoboka
kikanasubikwa.
[4] Ubushinjacyaha bwavuze ko HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul adashobora kongera
kugabanyirizwa igihano kubera ko cyagabanijwe bihagije kandi ko igihano yahawe kidashobora
gusubikwa kuko yahanishijwe igifungo kirenze imyaka 5.
[5] Mu rubanza N° RPA 01041/2021/HC/RWG rwaciwe ku wa 11/10/2024, Urukiko Rukuru,
Urugereko rwa Rwamagana rwasanze, kuba HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul yemera icyaha aregwa,

akaba nta kindi cyaha kizwi yahaniwe, ari impamvu zituma igihano yahanishijwe ku rwego
rubanza cyakongera kugabanywa, rushingiye ku ngingo ya 2, agace ka (a) na (d) y’Itegeko Nº
059/2023 ryo ku wa 04/12/2023 rihindura Itegeko Nº 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/08/2018 riteganya
ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange1, rumuhanisha igifungo cy’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu ya 5.000.000 Frw.
[6] HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul yajuriye bwa kabiri mu Rukiko rw’Ubujurire, urubanza
ruhabwa N° RPAA 01072/2024/CA, ruburanishwa ku wa 11/12/2025, yunganiwe na Me
RUBERWA N. Silas, Ubushinjacyaha buhagarariwe na SIBOMANA Stanislas, Umushinjacyaha
ku rwego rw’Igihugu.
[7] HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul asaba kugabanyirizwa igihano kugeza ku gifungo cy’imyaka
itanu 5 kikanasubikwa akajya kwita ku bana be batagira ubitaho kuko nyina ubabyara yabataye.
[8] Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul atakongera kugabanyirizwa
igihano kuko yagabanyirijwe bihagije ahabwa igihano gikwiranye n’icyaha yakoze, akaba
atabasha kugaragaza niba Urukiko rubanza rwaba rwarakoresheje nabi itegeko cyangwa
ubushishozi bwarwo mu gutanga icyo gihano.
[9] Muri uru rubanza hagiye gusuzumwa ikibazo cyo kumenya niba HAFASHIMANA Jean
Paul yakongera kugabanyirizwa akanasubikirwa igihano.
II. ISESENGURA RY’IKIBAZO KIGIZE URUBANZA
 Kumenya niba HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul yakongera kugabanyirizwa
akanasubikirwa igihano
[10] HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul avuga ko Urukiko Rukuru, Urugereko rwa Rwamagana
rutamugabanyirije ibihano uko bikwiye kuko rwamuhanishije igifungo cy’imyaka 15 rushingiye
ku ngingo ya 2, agace ka (a) y’Itegeko N° 059/2023 ryo ku wa 04/12/2023 rihindura Itegeko Nº
68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/08/2018 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange, mu gihe abandi bakoze
icyaha nk’icyo nawe yakoze kandi mu gihe kimwe bagize amahirwe yo kuburana mbere y’uko
Itegeko N° 059/2023 ryavuzwe haruguru ritangira gukurikizwa bahanishijwe igihano kiri munsi
y’igifungo cy’imyaka 15. Abo ni nka RUKUNDO Christian aho mu rubanza N° RPAA
00535/2022/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 20/10/2023, yagabanyirijwe igihano,
kiva ku gifungo cy’imyaka 25 yari yahanishijwe n’inkiko zibanza ku cyaha yahamijwe cyo
gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge, ahanishwa igifungo cy’imyaka 5.
[11] HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul asaba ko hashingirwa ku mirongo yakurikizwaga mbere
y’uko Itegeko N° 059/2023 ryavuzwe haruguru ritangira gukurikizwa, yatanzwe n’Urukiko
rw’Ikirenga ndetse n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire mu manza zitandukanye harimo urubanza N°
RS/INCONST/SPEC 00003/2019/SC rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ikirenga ku wa 04/12/2019,
urubanza N° RPAA 00032/2019/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 28/02/2020 haburana
Ubushinjacyaha na NZAFASHWANIMANA Jean de Dieu n’izindi, yemerera Umucamanza
1 teganya ko iyo umucamanza yemeje impamvu nyoroshyacyaha, igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu gishobora
kugabanywa ariko ntikijye munsi y’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15), ko igihano cy’ihazabu nacyo gishobora kugabanywa
kugeza kuri kimwe cya kane cy’igihano cy’ihazabu gito giteganyirijwe icyaha cyakozwe.

kugabanya igihano kugeza munsi y’igihano gito giteganywa n’amategeko, nawe agahabwa
amahirwe akagabanyirizwa igihano nk’uko na bagenzi be baburanye mbere y’uko ingingo ya 2
y’Itegeko N° 059/2023 ryavuzwe haruguru itangira gukurikizwa bagabanyirijwe, kuko atazira ko
yatinze kuburanishwa mu gihe abo bafatiwe mu gihe kimwe bahanishijwe ibihano bito.
[12] HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul asaba kandi ko hashingirwa no ku murogo watanzwe
n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire mu rubanza N° RPAA 00194/2021/CA rwaciwe ku wa 22/04/2022,
haburana Ubushinjacyaha na NDAYISHIMIYE Emmanuel alias Shema n’urubanza N° RPAA
00189/2021/CA rwaciwe ku wa 28/10/2022, haburana Ubushinjacyaha na BAKUNZIBAKE
Emmanuel, uvuga ko nta cyabuza Urukiko kugabanyiriza uregwa igihano hagamijwe gutanga
igihano kijyanye n’Uburemere bw’icyaha cyakozwe kabone n’ubwo iby’igihano byaba
bitaraburanyweho n’impamvu z’ubujurire zitahwe ishingiro; nawe akagabanyirizwa igihano
agahanishwa igifungo cy’imyaka 5 nk’icyahawe RUKUNDO Christian. Anasaba Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire ko rwazashingira ku ngingo ya 18 n’iya 19 z’Itegeko Nshinga rya Repubulika y’u
Rwanda ryo muri 2003 ryavuguruwe muri 2015, rukazirikana abana be batagira kirera kuko nyina
ubabyara yananiwe kwihangana arabasiga, ubu bakaba barabaye umuzigo ku bagiraneza babafite,
maze rukamusubikira ibihano akajya kwita kuri abo bana.
[13] Me RUBERWA N. Silas avuga ko mu Rukuru, Urugereko rwa Rwamagana
HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul yagabanyirijwe igihano hashingiye ku ngingo ya 2 y’Itegeko N°
059/2023 ryavuzwe haruguru, ahanishwa igifungo cy’imyaya 15 n’ihazabu ya 5.000.000 Frw,
nyamara ku bijyanye no kugabanya igihano iyo hari impamvu nyoroshyacyaha Umucamanza
agabanya ibihano uko abyumva ashingiye ku butabera buboneye, uburyo icyaha cyakozwemo
ingaruka cyateye akurikije umutima nama we atazitiwe n’Itegeko, asaba ko hashingirwa ku ngingo
ya 29 n’iya 151 z’Itegeko Nshinga rya Repubulika y’u Rwanda ryo muri 2003 ryavuguruwe muri
2015 ndetse n’ingingo ya 49 yIitegeko N° 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/08/2018 ritegenya ibyaha
n’ibihano muri rusange, HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul akongera kugabanyirizwa igihano.
[14] Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul atakongera kugabanyirizwa
igihano kuko yagabanyirijwe bihagije ahabwa igihano gikwiranye n’icyaha yakoze, akaba
atabasha kugaragaza niba Urukiko rubanza rwaba rwarakoresheje nabi itegeko cyangwa
ubushishozi bwarwo mu gutanga icyo gihano, kuko kongera kumugabanyiriza igihano bishoboka
gusa igihe icyo yahawe kitajyanye n’uburemere bw’icyaha yakoze ndetse n’ingaruka zacyo nk’uko
byemejwe mu rubanza N° RPA 00060/2021/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa
04/04/2022 haburana Ubushinjacyaha, NSABIMANA Callixte alias Sankara na bagenzi be, igika
cya 252-254.
[15] Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko, nk’uko byemejwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire mu manza
zitandukanye harimo urubanza Nº RPAA 00538/2024/CA rwaciwe ku wa 21/01/2025 haburana
Ubushinjacyaha na CYUZUZO Jean Claude (igika cya 12), urubanza Nº RPAA 00769/2024/CA
rwaciwe ku wa 27/05/2025, haburana Ubushinjacyaha na BIZABARIMANA Cléophas (igika cya
30) n’izindi, iyo hari impamvu nyoroshyacyaha zemejwe n’umucamanza icyaha gihanishwa
igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu n’ihazabu, icyo gihano gishobora kugabanywa ariko ntikijye
munsi y’igifungo cy’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu ikaba yagabanywa ariko ntijye munsi ya kimwe cya
kane cy’ihazabu nto iteganyirijwe icyaha cyakozwe. Bityo ko na HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul
wahanishijwe igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu ya miliyoni 5.000.000 Frw nyuma yo

kugabanyirizwa ibihano, atagomba kongera kugabanyirizwa kuko ntaho Urukiko rwahera
rumugabanyiriza.
[16] Ku bijyanye n’imanza HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul asaba ko zashingirwaho agahanishwa
igifungo cy’imyaka 5 nk’icyo abandi barimo RUKUNDO Christian bafashwe mu gihe kimwe
nawe kandi bakoze icyaha nk’icyo nawe yakoze baburanye mbere ye bahanishijwe,
Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko nta shingiro ifite kuko imanza zaciwe mbere y’uko itegeko N°
059/2023 ryavuzwe haruguru ritangira gukurikizwa zashingiraga ku mirongo yatanzwe
hashingiwe ku ngingo ya 60 y’Itegeko N° 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/08/2018 riteganya ibyaha
n’ibihano muri rusange, iyo ngingo ikaba yarahinduwe n’ingingo ya 2 y’Itegeko N° 059/2023
ryavuzwe haruguru iteganya uburyo bworohereza abafite impamvu nyoroshyacyaha zishobora
gutuma bagabanyirizwa ibihano, iyo mirongo ikaba itagikoreshwa nk’uko byemejwe mu manza
zitandukanye zirimo urubanza Nº RPAA 00048/2020/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa
26/05/2022, haburana Ubushinjacyaha na BIMENYIMANA Jean Paul, rwasobanuye ko
umurongo wari uriho udashobora gukurikizwa mu gihe itegeko wari ushingiyeho ryavuyeho
cyangwa ryahinduwe kandi ko imirongo yose ivuga ku igabanya ry’ibihano ishingiye ku manza
zaciwe mbere y’uko Itegeko N° 059/2023 ryavuzwe haruguru ritangira gukurikizwa
itagikoreshwa.
[17] Ku bijyanye n’imiburanire ya Me RUBERWA N. Silas y’uko iyo hari impamvu
nyoroshyacyaha Umucamanza agabanya igihano uko abyumva ashingiye ku butabera buboneye,
uburyo icyaha cyakozwemo ingaruka cyateye akurikije umutima nama we atazitiwe n’Itegeko,
Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko nayo nta shingiro ifite kuko Umucamanza mu mirimo ye agomba
gukurikiza amategeko agendanye n’ikibazo yashyikirijwe, ko kuba rero umucamanza yarashingiye
ku Itegeko ryateganyije uburyo ibihano bigabanywa ndetse no ku murongo usobanura uko ibihano
bigabanywa mu rwego rwo guhuza ibyemezo bifatwa mu nkiko ku bibazo bisa, nta kosa urukiko
Rukuru rwakoze rigomba gukosorwa n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire.
[18] Ubushinjacyaha busoza imiburanire yabwo buvuga ko, hashingiwe ku ngingo ya 183 agace
ka 5° n’aka 6° y’itegeko Nº 027/2019 ryo ku wa 19/09/2019 ryerekeye imiburanishirize y’imanza
z’inshinjabyaha2, busanga nta nenge cyangwa amakosa byakozwe mu rubanza rujurirwa, kuko
ibyo HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul n’umwunganira basaba byo kugabanya ibihano byasuzumwe
n’inkiko zabanje, kandi bihabwa ishingiro, HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul agabanyirizwa igihano ku
buryo buhagije kandi hakurikijwe amategeko, akaba atagaragaza ko izo nkiko zaba zarakoresheje
nabi ubushishozi cyangwa itegeko mu kugena igihano cyatanzwe, bityo ko ubujurire bwe nta
shingiro bufite.
UKO URUKIKO RUBIBONA
[19] Impaka muri uru rubanza zishingiye ku kumenya niba igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15
n’ihazabu ya 5.000.000 Frw HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul yahanishijwe n’Urukiko Rukuru,
2 Ivuga ko: “Ubujurire bukorwa mu buryo bw’umwanzuro utanga ikirego, ugaragaza ibi bikurikira: …. 5° urutonde
rw’inenge z’urubanza zisabirwa gukosorwa n’ibindi bibazo bigomba gusuzumwa;
6° ibisobanuro kuri buri nenge cyangwa kuri buri kibazo bigaragaza amakosa yakozwe n’uburyo agomba gukosorwa
hashingiwe ku mategeko n’ibimenyetso n’igisabwa urukiko…. “.

Urugereko rwa Rwamagana ku cyaha yahamijwe cyo gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko
bw’urumogi, gishobora kongera kugabanywa kikanasubikwa
[20] Nk’uko byemejwe mu manza zitandukanye zaciwe n’uru Rukiko, harimo urubanza N°
RPAA 00747/2024/CA3 n’urubanza N° RPAA 00237/2025/CA4, uwakoze icyaha gihanishwa
igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu, igihe hemejwe impamvu nyoroshyacyaha, ntashobora
kugabanyirizwa igihano cy’igifu ngo kijye munsi y’imyaka cumi itanu (15), n’igihano cy’ihazabu
ntigishobora kugabanywa ngo kijye munsi ya ¼ cy’igihano cy’ihazabu gito giteganyirijwe icyaha
cyakozwe.
[21] Nk’uko kandi byemejwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire mu manza zitandukanye, harimo rubanza
Nº RPAA 00811/2024/CA5 n’urubanza N° RPAA 00237/2025/CA6, imanza zaciwe mbere y’uko
hasohoka Itegeko Nº 059/2023 ryo ku wa 4/12/2023 rihindura Itegeko Nº 68/2018 ryo ku wa
30/8/2018 ritegenya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange, zashingirwagaho uregwa akagabanyirizwa
igihano kugeza munsi y’igihano gito giteganywa n’Itegeko, ntizigikurikizwa kuko zaciwe
hashingiwe ku ngingo ya 60 y’Itegeko Nº 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/8/2018 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano
muri rusange, ikaba yarahinduwe n’ingingo ya 2 y’iryo Tegeko Nº 059/2023 ryo ku wa 4/12/2023,
itemerera Urukiko kujya munsi y’igihano gito giteganywa n’Itegeko.
[22] Nk’uko byemejwe na none n’uru Rukiko mu rubanza N° RPAA 00293/2024/CA7,
urubanza N° RPAA 00957/2024/CA8, Urukiko rushobora gutegeka ihagarika ry’irangizarubanza
ku gihano cyose cyangwa igice cyacyo, haba igihano cy’iremezo (igifungo, ihazabu n’imirimo
y’inyungu rusange) cyangwa igihano cy’ingereka, iyo rwakatiye ukurikiranywaho icyaha igihano
cy’igifungo kitarenze imyaka itanu (5).
[23] Nk’uko bigaragara mu gika cya 7 cy’Urubanza rujuririrwa, Urukiko Rukuru, Urugereko
rwa Rwamagana rwagabanyirije igihano HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul rushingiye ku kuba yemera
icyaha no kuba nta kindi cyaha kizwi yahaniwe, ahanishwa igifungo cy’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu ya
5.000.000 Frw.
[24] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rushingiye ku mirongo yatanzwe mu manza zibukijwe mu bika bya
20, 21 na 22 by’uru rubanza, rurasanga igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu ya 5.000.000
Frw HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul yahanishijwe n’Urukiko Rukuru, Urugereko rwa Rwamagana,
kitakongera kugabanywa kuko cyagabanyijwe bihagije kandi kikaba aricyo gihano gito ntarengwa
giteganyijwe ku cyaha kimuhama cyo gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge byo mubwoko bw’urumogi,
kikaba kidashobora kugibwa munsi. Rurasanga kandi HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul adashobora
3 Reba igika cya 16 cy’urubanza N° RPAA 00747/2024/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 23/05/2025
haburana Ubushinjacyaha na CYUBAHIRO Jean-Petit (Peth).
4 Reba igika cya 16 cy’urubanza N° RPAA 00237/2025/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 21/11/2025,
haburana Ubushinjacyaha na NTIRENGANYA Jean Paul.
5 Reba igika cya 17 cy’urubanza N° RPAA 00811/2024/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 21/3/2025,
haburana Ubushinjacyaha na NTAMAVUKIRO Joseph.
6 Reba igika cya 17 cy’urubanza N° RPAA 00237/2025/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa ku wa
21/11/2025, haburana Ubushinjacyaha na NTIRENGANYA Jean Paul.
7 Reba igika cya 44 cy’urubanza N° RPAA 00293/2024/CA, rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 26/02/2025,
Ubushinjacyaha buburana na TWISUNGEMUNGU Jeannette.
8 Reba igika cya 17 cy’urubanza N° RPAA 00957/2024/CA, rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 22/04/2025
haburana Ubushinjacyaha KWIZERA Didier.

gusubikirwa igihano kuko igihano cy’igifungo yahanishijwe kirenze imyaka itanu (5) yemewe
n’amategeko kugira ngo habeho isubikagihano.
[25] Ku bijyanye n’imanza zatanze umurongo wemerera Umucamanza kugabanya igihano
kugeza munsi y’igihano gito giteganywa n’amategeko HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul asaba ko
zashingirwaho akagabanyirizwa igihano, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga izo manza
zitashingirwaho kuko nk’uko byasobanuwe mu gika 21 cy’uru rubanza, izo manza
zitagikurikizwa.
[26] Ku bijyanye n’imiburanire ya Me RUBERWA N. Silas y’uko iyo hari impamvu
nyoroshyacyaha Umucamanza agabanya igihano uko abyumva ashingiye ku butabera buboneye,
uburyo icyaha cyakozwemo ingaruka cyateye akurikije umutima nama we atazitiwe n’Itegeko,
Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga nta shingiro ifite kuko nk’uko byakomeje kugaragazwa mu bika
bibanziriza iki, mu ngingo ya 2 y’Itegeko N° 059/2023 ryo ku wa 04/12/2023 rihindura Itegeko
N° 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/08/2018 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange, Umushingamategeko
yateganyije uburyo ibihano bishobora kugabanywa igihe hari impamvu nyoroshyacyaha, aho
yateganyije ko igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu gishobora kugabanywa ariko ntikijye munsi
y’igifungo cy’imyaka 15, ko n’ihazabu ishobora kugabaywa ariko ntijye munsi ya ¼ cy’igihano
cy’ihabu gito giteganyirijwe icyaha cyakozwe.
[27] Byumvikanisha ko igihe hari impamvu nyoroshyacyaha Umucamanza atagabanya igihano
uko abyumva nk’uko Me RUBERWA N. Silas ashaka kubyumvikanisha, ahubwo agabanya
igihano akurikije uburemere bw’icyaha, uburyo cyakozwemo ingaruka cyateye, ariko mu mbibi
z’igihano giteganywa n’Itegeko, ari nako byagenze kuri HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul
wagabanyirijwe igihano kubera impamvu nyoroshyacyaha agahanishwa igifungo cy’imyaka 15
n’ihazabu ya 5.000.000 Frw, mugihe icyaha kimuhama cyo gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge bihambaye
byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi gihanishwa igifungo cya burundu n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u
Rwanda arenze miliyoni 20.000.000 Frw ariko atarenze miliyoni 30.000.000 Frw9.
[28] Hashingiwe ku bisobanuro byose byatanzwe muri uru rubanza, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire
rurasanga ubujurire bwa HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul nta shingiro bufite, urubanza yajuririye
rukaba rudahindutse
III. ICYEMEZO CY’URUKIKO
[29] Rwemeje ko ubujurire bwatanzwe na HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul nta shingiro bufite;
[30] Rwemeje ko urubanza N° RPA 01041/2021/HC/RWG rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rukuru,
Urugereko rwa Rwamagana ku wa 11/10/2024 rudahindutse;
9 Ingingo ya 11, igika cya 3 y’Itegeko N° 69/2019 ryo ku wa 08/11/2019 rihindura Itegeko N° 68/2018 ryo ku wa
30/08/2018 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange ivuga ko: “Umuntu wese ukora, uhinga, uhindura, utunda, ubika,
uha undi, ugurisha mu gihugu ibiyobyabwenge cyangwa urusobe rw’imiti ikoreshwa nka byo mu buryo bunyuranije
n’amategeko, aba akoze icyaha. Iyo abihamijwe n’urukiko ahanishwa: 1 º igifungo cya burundu n’ihazabu
y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda arenze miliyoni makumyabiri (20.000.000 FRW) ariko atarenze miliyoni mirongo itatu
(30.000.000 FRW) ku byerekeye ibiyobyabwenge bihambaye …..”.

[31] Rwemeje ko igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda
miliyoni 5.000.000 Frw HAFASHIMANA Jean Paul yahanishijwe muri urwo rubanza kigumyeho.
keywords: Uwakoze icyaha gihanishwa igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu
